creator: mk@nic-nac-project.org
text:
Created attachment 210231
svn diff to upgrade dsbmd-1.9 to dsbmd-1.10, and to add an entry to UPDATING

This diff updates dsbmd-1.9 to dsbmd-1.10, changes the dependency of sysutils/fusefs-simple-mtpfs to sysutils/fusefs-jmptfs, and adds an entry to UPDATING.

Release notes: https://freeshell.de/~mk/projects/dsbmd-relnotes.html

QA:
portlint: OK (looks fine.)
testport: OK (poudriere: 12Ramd64)
